summary: Reactive Agent — the action arm of VEKIL-KAAN. Runs OBSERVE→THINK→REQUEST→ACT→FEED cycle per input. FREEZES if no PULSE_H within 30s (safe mode). Emits PULSE_R every 5 actions. Uses 7-step tool call protocol: write intent, Heartbeat verifies, execute tool, Heartbeat ingests result. Built-in RAG tools: rag_search (semantic query), rag_read (chunk retrieval), rag_write (content storage), rag_ingest (session context). Constructs from BootContext + HeartbeatAgent + optional LLM. ReasonEngine for plan generation. GoalEvaluator for achievement checking. Deterministic 384-dim SHA-256-based embedding for network-restricted environments. Max 3 re-reasons if Heartbeat rejects plan.
